      "actionName": "workspace_write",
      "args": {
        "content": "# Harness Engineering in AI Agent Systems: A Deep Research Report\n\n## 1. Definition\nHarness Engineering is an emerging architectural discipline dedicated to building the operational scaffolding that connects Large Language Model (LLM) reasoning to deterministic execution environments. In AI agentic systems, the harness serves as the critical middleware that bridges the gap between probabilistic model outputs and the reality of computational execution. According to research from the Microsoft Ag…",
        "path": "harness_engineering_ai_report.md",
        "summary": "Drafted comprehensive research report on Harness Engineering in AI agent systems."
      },

        "content": "# Harness Engineering in AI Agent Systems: A Research Report\n\n## 1.                 "content": "# Harness Engineering in AI Agent Systems: A Deep Research Report\n\n## 1. Definition\nHarness Engineering is an emerging architectural discipline dedicated to building the operational scaffolding that connects Large Language Model (LLM) reasoning to deterministic execution environments.           "content": "# Harness Engineering in AI Agent Systems: A Deep Research Report\n\n## 1. Definition\nHarness Engineering is an emerging architectural discipline dedicated to building the operational scaffolding that connects Large Language Model (LLM) reasoning to deterministic execution environments.
